title: fix: exclude free-tier requests from pricing avg cost
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Fixing the pollen abacus
gist.blurb: Our pricing calculator was accidentally counting free-tier requests in its averages, making some models look mathematically impossible. We've fixed the math so the stats page tells the truth.
gist.summary: Updated the public model stats pipeline to exclude zero-cost requests, fixing an issue that artificially lowered the displayed average cost per model.
gist.impact: Users will now see accurate, transparent 'per pollen' generation estimates on the pricing page.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot wearing tiny accountant glasses, looking at a retro calculator. The Nomnom creature is eating 'free' receipts so they don't get counted in the final bill. Lime green and pastel background.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny accountant glasses, using a retro chunky calculator. Nearby, the round Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of zero-dollar receipts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
